listings.title: Exceptional Penthouse with Panoramic Views
listings.description: Exceptional penthouse occupying the entire top floor with uninterrupted panoramic views across Barcelona from the sea to Montjuïc.

listings.title: Elegant Modernist Apartment with Terrace
listings.description: Beautifully restored apartment in a classic Eixample building with original modernist details and a private terrace.

listings.title: Magnificent Villa with Private Pool & Garden
listings.description: Magnificent detached villa set in lush gardens in the prestigious Sarrià district, featuring a private pool and outdoor entertaining areas.

listings.title: Stunning Seafront Apartment with Terrace
listings.description: Stunning seafront apartment with unobstructed Mediterranean views and a generous terrace ideal for year-round living.

listings.title: Charming Townhouse with Rooftop Terrace
listings.description: Charming townhouse in the heart of Gràcia with a private rooftop terrace offering sweeping views of the neighbourhood.

listings.title: Boutique Studio in Historic Gothic Quarter
listings.description: Beautifully designed boutique studio in a restored historic building in El Born, steps from Barcelona's best restaurants and galleries.
